core.label: Gleam Fundamentals
core.description: Friendly functional programming on the BEAM with static types.

topics.label: Installation
topics.description: Install Gleam and create projects. Gleam compiles to Erlang (BEAM) or JavaScript.

topics.label: Types & Values
topics.description: Int, Float, String, Bool, List, Tuple, and custom types. Gleam is statically typed.

topics.label: Functions & Pipe
topics.description: fn keyword, labeled arguments, and the |> pipe operator.

topics.label: Pattern Matching
topics.description: case expressions with exhaustive matching. Gleam's primary control flow.

topics.label: Custom Types
topics.description: Define sum types and record types. Model your domain precisely.

topics.label: Modules
topics.description: Every file is a module. Public functions with pub, imports with import.

topics.label: Result & Option
topics.description: Result(value, error) and Option for error handling. No exceptions.

topics.label: OTP Integration
topics.description: Use Erlang OTP processes and supervisors from Gleam for concurrency.
